basic_details.job_title: PGIMER Senior Demonstrator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc in Health Economics or MPH and Ph.D (Thesis in Health Economics)
qualification.details: MSc in Health Economics or MPH and Ph.D (Thesis in Health Economics)

salary_details.pay_scale: As per PGIMER rules and regulations
salary_details.details: As per PGIMER rules and regulations

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER Senior Demonstrator post?
faq.answer: The last date to send your application via email for the Senior Demonstrator (Health Economics) position at PGIMER is 22nd June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Senior Demonstrator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Demonstrator (Health Economics) post at PGIMER.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSc in Health Economics or an MPH degree along with a Ph.D. with a thesis in Health Economics.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Demonstrator position?
faq.answer: The salary for this post will be as per PGIMER's rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to apply by sending their application via email before the specified deadline.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Demonstrator role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. When is the interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The interview for the Senior Demonstrator (Health Economics) post is scheduled for 23rd June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is PGIMER located?
faq.answer: PGIMER is located in Chandigarh.
